This article applies to selling in: **United States**

# Local Selling Terms

Sign in to use the tool and get personalized help (desktop browser required).

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/sign-in?use_default_idp&redirect_to=%2Fhelp%2Fhub%2Freference%2Fexternal%2FGUGFQ9HS2JBLN7XZ)

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GUGFQ9HS2JBLN7XZ)

Local Selling is a program that enables Amazon sellers to offer products in Amazon’s online store to customers in local regions (“Local Selling”). These terms supplement your [Amazon Services Business Solutions Agreement](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/1791) (the “Seller Agreement”) and govern participation in the Local Selling program. Any capitalized terms not defined in these terms have the meaning set forth in the Seller Agreement.

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GUGFQ9HS2JBLN7XZ)
## Your responsibilities

You will comply with the [Local Selling Program Policies](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK), and other policies that Amazon may designate; and, upon request, provide Amazon with reports (in a form designated by Amazon) relating to your compliance with these requirements.

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GUGFQ9HS2JBLN7XZ)
## Local Selling definitions

#### “Local Product”

This means any product that you may offer in Amazon’s online store to customers in a specific Local Selling Region.

#### “Local Selling Region”

This means a selling region defined by you that is smaller than all regions of the U.S.

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GUGFQ9HS2JBLN7XZ)
## Local Selling offers

For each listing of a Local Product available for delivery within a particular Local Selling Region, you must provide to Amazon, in real-time or near real-time, information that accurately reflects your physical store offer in the same Local Selling Region.

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GUGFQ9HS2JBLN7XZ)
## Insurance

Unless we inform you in writing that you are exempt from these requirements, and regardless of the amount of gross proceeds from your Local Selling, you will maintain and cause your affiliates (including through a third party) to maintain at all times while you participate in the Local Selling program a commercial general liability insurance with a limit of $1,000,000 U.S. dollars per occurrence and in aggregate to cover liabilities caused by or occurring in conjunction with the offer and sale of your Local Products. You will document the existence of proper coverage in your Seller Central Account, and keep such documentation up-to-date. You will provide Amazon with at least 30 days’ advance written notice of cancellation, significant modification, or lapse of coverage. At our request, you will provide to us certificates of insurance for the coverage by email at [coi@amazon.com](mailto:coi@amazon.com) or by mail to c/o Amazon, P.O

. Box 81226, Seattle, WA 98108-1226, Attention: Risk Management.

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GUGFQ9HS2JBLN7XZ)
## Fees

Go to [Selling on Amazon Fee Schedule](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/200336920), for more information about fees that apply to Local Selling. Go to [Payments by Service Type](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/202146410), for information on the fees applicable to selling your Local Services or search Seller Central Help for "referral fees."

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GUGFQ9HS2JBLN7XZ)
## Services

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GUGFQ9HS2JBLN7XZ)
## Services

For any Local Product for which you offer an attached Service, you will comply with the terms, definitions, and policies for Amazon Services providers, as detailed in the [Selling Services Terms](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/G201484410), the [Amazon Services Providers Program Policies](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/G9GPDWV663AD4USD), and the [Service Level Requirements and Metrics](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/202043250).
